title: The official Alipay Cloud Developer WeChat Official Account is officially renamed to Qwen AI Platform
excerpt: On July 22, the original WeChat official account "Aliyun Developer" was officially renamed to "Qwen AI Platform". This brand upgrade aims to adapt to the new tr
content_html:
On July 22, the original WeChat official account "Aliyun Developer" was officially renamed to "Qwen AI Platform". This brand upgrade aims to adapt to the new trend of AI evolving from an auxiliary tool to an independent thinking, collaborating, and creative Agent (intelligent entity). It marks that Alibaba Cloud will focus more on cutting-edge technologies such as large models and Agents, and embark on a comprehensive upgrade of AI content and developer services.

Under the new positioning of "Born for Agents, Driving AI Productivity," the "Qwen AI Platform" relies on the large model capabilities of Tongyi Qianwen and the technical accumulation of Alibaba Cloud, and focuses on three key areas for in-depth layout: first, delving into AI frontiers, sharing breakthroughs in large model technology, industry application cases, and best practices at the earliest opportunity; second, fully empowering developers by providing more rich AI development tools, tutorials, and community support; third, building ecological connections, creating a bridge between technology and application scenarios, and exploring practical paths for large models to empower various industries.

As large model technology enters the deep waters of intelligence, AI Agents are gradually becoming the core form of the next generation of productivity applications. This positioning shift from "Developer" to "AI Platform" not only reflects Alibaba Cloud's keen insight into the direction of technological trends, but also indicates its acceleration in integrating software and hardware and model capabilities. By building a more complete AI technology ecosystem, it provides solid support for industrial transformation and ecological prosperity in the era of large models.

This brand upgrade aims to adapt to the new trend of AI evolving from an auxiliary tool to an independent thinking, collaborating, and creative Agent (intelligent entity). sentences.en: On July 22, the original WeChat official account "Aliyun Developer" was officially renamed to "Qwen AI Platform".
sentences.zh: 7月22日，原微信公众号“阿里云开发者”正式更名为“Qwen AI平台”。

sentences.en: This brand upgrade aims to adapt to the new trend of AI evolving from an auxiliary tool to an independent thinking, collaborating, and creative Agent (intelligent entity).
sentences.zh: 此次品牌升级旨在适应人工智能从辅助工具向独立思考、协作、创意的Agent（智能实体）演变的新趋势。

sentences.en: It marks that Alibaba Cloud will focus more on cutting-edge technologies such as large models and Agents, and embark on a comprehensive upgrade of AI content and developer services.
sentences.zh: 标志着阿里云将更加聚焦大模型、Agent等前沿技术，着手AI内容和开发者服务的全面升级。

blocks.html_en: Under the new positioning of "Born for Agents, Driving AI Productivity," the "Qwen AI Platform" relies on the large model capabilities of Tongyi Qianwen and the technical accumulation of Alibaba Cloud, and focuses on three key areas for in-depth layout: first, delving into AI frontiers, sharing breakthroughs in large model technology, industry application cases, and best practices at the earliest opportunity; second, fully empowering developers by providing more rich AI development tools, tutorials, and community support; third, building ecological connections, creating a bridge between technology and application scenarios, and exploring practical paths for large models to empower various industries.

sentences.en: Under the new positioning of "Born for Agents, Driving AI Productivity," the "Qwen AI Platform" relies on the large model capabilities of Tongyi Qianwen and the technical accumulation of Alibaba Cloud, and focuses on three key areas for in-depth layout: first, delving into AI frontiers, sharing breakthroughs in large model technology, industry application cases, and best practices at the earliest opportunity; second, fully empowering developers by providing more rich AI development tools, tutorials, and community support; third, building ecological connections, creating a bridge between technology and application scenarios, and exploring practical paths for large models to empower various industries.
sentences.zh: 在“为智能体而生，驱动AI生产力”的新定位下，“Qwen AI平台”依托统一钱文的大模型能力和阿里云的技术积累，围绕三个关键领域进行深度布局：一是深耕AI前沿，第一时间分享大模型技术突破、行业应用案例和最佳实践；二是充分赋能开发者，提供更丰富的AI开发工具、教程和社区支持；三是构建生态连接，搭建技术与应用场景的桥梁，探索大模型赋能各行业的实践路径。

This positioning shift from "Developer" to "AI Platform" not only reflects Alibaba Cloud's keen insight into the direction of technological trends, but also indicates its acceleration in integrating software and hardware and model capabilities. By building a more complete AI technology ecosystem, it provides solid support for industrial transformation and ecological prosperity in the era of large models.

sentences.en: As large model technology enters the deep waters of intelligence, AI Agents are gradually becoming the core form of the next generation of productivity applications.
sentences.zh: 随着大模型技术进入智能深水区，AI Agent正逐渐成为下一代生产力应用的核心形态。

sentences.en: This positioning shift from "Developer" to "AI Platform" not only reflects Alibaba Cloud's keen insight into the direction of technological trends, but also indicates its acceleration in integrating software and hardware and model capabilities.
sentences.zh: 此次从“开发者”到“AI平台”的定位转变，不仅体现了阿里云对技术趋势方向的敏锐洞察，也预示着阿里云在软硬件和模型能力融合方面的加速。

sentences.en: By building a more complete AI technology ecosystem, it provides solid support for industrial transformation and ecological prosperity in the era of large models.
sentences.zh: 通过构建更加完善的AI技术生态，为大模型时代的产业变革和生态繁荣提供坚实支撑。

content_html_zh:
7月22日，原微信公众号“阿里云开发者”正式更名为“Qwen AI平台”。 此次品牌升级旨在适应人工智能从辅助工具向独立思考、协作、创意的Agent（智能实体）演变的新趋势。 标志着阿里云将更加聚焦大模型、Agent等前沿技术，着手AI内容和开发者服务的全面升级。

在“为智能体而生，驱动AI生产力”的新定位下，“Qwen AI平台”依托统一钱文的大模型能力和阿里云的技术积累，围绕三个关键领域进行深度布局：一是深耕AI前沿，第一时间分享大模型技术突破、行业应用案例和最佳实践；二是充分赋能开发者，提供更丰富的AI开发工具、教程和社区支持；三是构建生态连接，搭建技术与应用场景的桥梁，探索大模型赋能各行业的实践路径。

随着大模型技术进入智能深水区，AI Agent正逐渐成为下一代生产力应用的核心形态。 此次从“开发者”到“AI平台”的定位转变，不仅体现了阿里云对技术趋势方向的敏锐洞察，也预示着阿里云在软硬件和模型能力融合方面的加速。 通过构建更加完善的AI技术生态，为大模型时代的产业变革和生态繁荣提供坚实支撑。
